so we can officially make the viral dot cake at home and it’s my new favorite little treat 🧁🌈 Ingredients: 1 box @Funfetti cake mix 3 eggs 1 cup water 1/2 cup oil funfetti vanilla frosting rainbow nonpareils sprinkles Instructions: In a large mixing bowl, mix cake mix, eggs, water, and oil until well combined and transfer to a greased square baking pan. Bake at 350° for 35-40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through. Allow to cool completely, then press greased ramekin into the center and twist to remove. Allow mini cake to slide out of ramekin and slice through the center to create 2 layers. Place bottom layer back in ramekin, top with a layer of frosting, then place top layer of cake with another layer of frosting spread evenly to the edges. Cover in rainbow nonpareils, allow to chill and slightly harden in the fridge, then take a center bite and enjoy! 😋 #cake #Recipe #baking #dessert #creatorsearchinsights

Bulgarian split squats will humble you every single time 😭 but if you want stronger glutes, toned legs, better balance, and that sculpted lower body look… you can’t skip them. One leg at a time means no cheating, no relying on your stronger side, just pure growth and stability. They burn like crazy but the results speak for themselves 🍑 Save this workout and add it to your next leg day if you’re serious about building those glutes and leveling up your physique. #bulgariansplitsquats #glutegrowth #legdayworkout #fitnessgirl #GymTok

사람을 본 적이 없어서 덜덜 떠는 시골 노견 🥺 대나무숲 복실이.. 고사리밭 위 대나무 숲에 혼자 사는 겁쟁이 10살 복실이 등장 ㅠㅠ 🐶 수소문 끝에 견주분 찾아서 허락받고 대공사 시작! 여기저기 자란 대나무가 앞을 막고 있고, 청소하는데 역대급 먼지랑 오물이 나와서 진짜 식겁했습니다 ㄷㄷ 풀 뽑고 대나무 싹 베어준 뒤, 제 발판 써서 개집 위치까지 완벽하게 리모델링 완료! 🧽 개집 물청소에 목초액 살균도 때려줬습니다. 구독자분들 요청으로 '진드기 목걸이'도 처음 가져갔는데, 애가 사람을 워낙 못 보고 자라 경계심이 극에 달해서 채워주는데 겨우겨우 성공 ㅠㅠ 푹신한 새 담요 깔아주고 특식 잔뜩 줬는데도 덜덜 떨기만 하고 절대 안 먹더라고요 🥺 결국 먹방 실패... 너무 안타까웠어요. 가벼운 와이어 줄로 바꿔주려 했더니 목에 찬 줄이 너무 삭아있어서 실패 😭 조만간 새 줄 사서 무조건 다시 올 겁니다!! 저녁에 견주분이 고맙다고 복숭아 수확하면 보내주신다길래 마음만 감사히 받고 복실이 잘 부탁드린다고 훈훈하게 마무리했어요 🍑 복실아 담에 또 올게!! 영상 보며 따뜻한 마음 보내주시는 모든 분들 정말 감사합니다! 답글을 다 달아드리진 못하지만, 남겨주시는 소중한 댓글은 하나하나 꼼꼼히 다 읽고 있습니다! 늘 죄송하고 감사해요 🥺 마지막으로 제 프로필에 올려둔 링크를 클릭하신 후 리스팅된 쿠팡 제품을 한 번 더 클릭하여, 꼭 해당 제품이 아니더라도 24시간 안에 아무 물품이나 구매해 주시면 쿠팡으로부터 일정 수수료를 지급받아 이 아이들에게 더 맛있는 다음 배달을 준비하는 데 큰 도움이 됩니다. 늘 감사합니다 ✨ #강아지 #반려견 #애견 #시고르자브종 #viraltiktok #trending

Le chirurgien plasticien José Soler-Baillo, qui exerce à Miami, est devenu viral après la publication de vidéos filmées pendant ses opérations. En plein bloc opératoire, il s’ambiance sur de la house. Une pratique courante chez certains chirurgiens, car la diffusion de musique peut favoriser la concentration et créer un climat de travail plus détendu. Cependant, il est beaucoup plus rare de voir des images tournées pendant les opérations être publiées sur les réseaux sociaux. Crédit : @drsolerbaillo / IG

In the One Piece Episode 1163, titled “I Want You to Praise Me - The Reunion of Robin and Saul,” One Piece delivered one of the most emotional reunions in the entire series as Robin finally reunited with Saul after 22 years of pain, loneliness, and survival. The little girl who once lost everything in Ohara finally broke down in tears in front of the man who first told her she deserved to live. When Robin asked, “Can you praise me for holding out this long?”, it felt like decades of heartbreak and silent suffering came pouring out at once. Seeing the Straw Hats cry beside her while Saul stood there alive again made this moment unforgettable for every One Piece fan.#onepiece1163 #robin #luffy #nicorobin #onepiece

This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

Recipe below!👇🏼Why spend at M&S when you can make it at home and even better 🍓☀️ ⭐️ Ingredients: - 6-8 fresh strawberries (preferably similar size) - 4 slices of soft white bread (crustless milk bread if possible) - 200ml double cream - 2 tbsp sugar - 1/2 tsp vanilla extract (optional) ⭐️ Method： 1. Wash strawberries. 2. Beat heavy cream with sugar (and vanilla if using) until stiff peaks form. 3. Spread whipped cream on bread, place strawberries, cover with more cream, and top with another bread slice. 4. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and chill for 30 minutes. 5. Slice cleanly and enjoy! #sando #strawberrysando #strawberries #strawberriesandcream #aesthetic #trending #marksandspencer #viral #fyp #baking #baketok #dessert #explore #Recipe #EasyRecipe

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Gelatine is a collagen-derived protein containing 18 amino acids and is especially rich in glycine, proline, and hydroxyproline, which help to support gut lining integrity by contributing to things like mucus production, epithelial repair, and tight-junction stability. It's been used for health purposes since ancient times across many cultures, yet modern diets are largely devoid of these connective-tissue-derived nutrients, despite a substantial and growing body of research. And no; there is no vegan alternative, and no; collagen peptides do not serve the same structural functions. Bovine (beef) or marine (fish) gelatine is always preferred; for beef, yes ideally grass-fed, and yes there are kosher and halal producers for both 💫 #gelatine #themoreyouknow #guthealth #fyp #fy

Dumbbell Sumo Squat  Know the difference  1. Dumbbell Position Hold the dumbbell with both hands naturally hanging between your legs, rather than holding it at your chest. This allows you to lift heavier weights without being limited by arm strength. 2. Torso Posture Maintain a slight forward lean instead of staying fully upright. Leaning forward increases hip flexion, helping to stretch and better activate the glutes. 3. Stance Width and Foot Angle Set your feet about 1.5 times shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing outward at roughly a 45-degree angle. If the stance is too wide, the inner thigh muscles (adductors) will take over, reducing glute activation. 4. Load Path As you squat down, the dumbbell should not stay directly under your shoulders. Instead, it should fall slightly behind the midline, closer to your posterior chain. Bring your hands slightly inward to keep the load closer to your center of mass, which helps reduce lower back strain and improves movement efficiency. #gymtips #quads #gluteworkout #gym #gymrat

As promised, this is my current scalp care routine! I previously didn’t think additional scalp care would do much for me, but the research behind the Pantene Abundant & Strong system (and all the research I’ve found on other scalp ingredients / products since) really changed my mind. Now I think about my scalp care routine as a proactive routine to keep my scalp + new hair growth in the healthiest state possible. This isn’t a routine that I think everyone *needs* to do, but for those who are also interested in promoting scalp health & improving hair retention, hopefully this gives you some steps to choose from that might help! Also- the results I’ve seen would only be from the scalp serums + shampoos alone because I haven’t been using the scalp device or red light helmet long enough to see any visible change yet. LMK if you want videos on my top recommendations for scalp serums + scalp focused shampoos next! Products Mentioned: 1. Pantene Abundant & Strong Serum 2. Neutrogena Hair Restore Serum  3. OGX Pro Growth + Peptide Shampoo 4. Dr Groot Scalp Revitalizing Hair Thickening Shampoo 5. DS Labs Scalp Activator - this was gifted with no obligation to review 6.
